win_condition: Complete 4 of Grandpa's Goals and restore all 6 Community Center Rooms before the Season Deck runs out
message: Stardew Valley is fully cooperative. Complete all 4 of Grandpa's Goals and restore all 6 Community Center Rooms (by completing 1 Bundle per room) before the Season Deck is exhausted. If the final Season Card is drawn before both objectives are met, Joja Corporation wins. On Artisan difficulty, you must also clear all Joja Tiles from the board.
